# Onda Corporation
# Hydrophone Calibration Data
#
Calibration_DATE	21-Jul-2023
#
# Hydrophone description
HYD_MFG	Onda
HYD_MODEL	HNA
HYD_APERTURE_NOM_UM	0400
HYD_SN	1344
HYD_POLARITY	Positive
#
# Attenuator description
ATTEN_MFG	ONDA
ATTEN_MODEL	ATH-2000
ATTEN_SN	1039
ATTEN_GAIN_NOM_DB	-20
ATTEN_BW_MHZ	100
ATTEN_OUTPUT_IMP_NOM_OHMS	50
#
# External preamplifier description
AMP_MFG	ONDA
AMP_MODEL	AH-2010-100
AMP_SN	2040
AMP_GAIN_NOM_DB	20
AMP_BW_MHZ	100
AMP_OUTPUT_IMP_NOM_OHMS	50
#
# Cable/adaptor between hydrophone and preamplifier
CA_BWT_HYD_AMP	NONE
#
# Environment
ELECTRICAL_LOAD	50Ohms
SOFTWARE_VERSION	1.0.8.0
SYSTEM_SETTING	OndaCombineCal.exe
WATER_TEMP_DEGC	23.50
WATER_RESISTIVITY_MOHMS-CM	7.5
#
# Calibration data
# Freq(MHz) Sens(dB re. 1V/uPa) Sens(V/Pa) Sens(V^2cm^2/W)
#
DATA_FIELDS	4
DATA_FIELD	FREQ_MHZ
DATA_FIELD	SENS_DB
DATA_FIELD	SENS_VPERPA
DATA_FIELD	SENS_V2CM2PERW
# End of file header
HEADER_END	0
